arts.sum: After going 2-0 down in the 59th minute in Lecce, AC Milan's fourth defeat in a row seemed unavoidable, but the Rossoneri finally had a bit of luck on their side and were able to pull off a crazy come...

arts.ttl: England squad announcement LIVE: Thomas Tuchel set to name players for first World Cup qualifiers
arts.sum: The new England manager will hold a press conference after announcing his first Three Lions squad ahead of World Cup qualifiers against Albania and Latvia at Wembley

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Félix not likely to stay at Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan will unlikely sign Portugal forward João Félix on a permanent deal. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.
